title: Non-record: ZerO Initalization + Progressive KV, RoPE proportion and base, and MLP mult from 9-layer, 512-dim, 8-head, and maximum 4-kv-head model
author: AlstonTang

data.description: ZerO initialization using Hadamard/identity-like matrices for more deterministic initialization.
Progressively increases KV head count with depth.
Progressively varies RoPE proportion and base across layers.
Progressively varies MLP multiplier across layers.
Base model described as a 9-layer, 512-dim, 8-head Transformer.

novel_contributions: ZerO initialization for more deterministic training
Progressive KV head count across layers
Progressive RoPE proportion and base across layers
Applied these ideas to a 9-layer, 512-dim, 8-head Transformer with up to 4 KV heads
